name: X-Golf Traverse City
address: 3480 W South Airport Rd # B, Traverse City, MI 49684
about: X-Golf Traverse City is an indoor golf venue featuring six state-of-the-art simulators that offer a realistic and accurate golfing experience year-round. The facility is designed as an entertainment and sports bar, combining golf simulation with a full-service restaurant and bar, making it suitable for both serious practice and social events. It operates on a per-bay hourly pricing model and accommodates various groups, from individuals and families to corporate teams, with amenities such as club rentals, lessons, and private event hosting.
why_golfers_like_it: World's most accurate indoor golf simulator with advanced camera, laser, and impact sensor technology
On-site Callaway custom club fittings and professional golf instruction available
Full-service bar and kitchen offering local craft beers and food to enhance the experience
Flexible booking for groups up to 6 people per bay with multiple pricing tiers
Host to seasonal leagues and tournaments for competitive play

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with tasty bites and no outside food allowed
Full liquor bar with draft and local craft beer available

simulator_hardware.notes: Combination of camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can bring your own clubs or rent them for $15 per set. Specify left or right hand and men, women, or children sizes.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink, including coffee, are not allowed. The venue has a full bar and kitchen available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes approximately one hour per person to complete 18 holes, regardless of skill level.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome, and club rentals are available for kids.
